SonarQube Warning Analysis: Pre vs Post Cursor Adoption

Load Required Libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(RColorBrewer)

# Set theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

Data Loading

# Load warning definitions (rule metadata)
definitions <- read_csv("../data/sonarqube_warning_definitions.csv",
                       show_col_types = FALSE)

# Load actual warnings
warnings <- read_csv("../data/sonarqube_warnings.csv",
                    show_col_types = FALSE)

# Display data structure
cat("Warning definitions:", nrow(definitions), "rules\n")
## Warning definitions: 933 rules
cat("Total warnings:", nrow(warnings), "warnings\n")
## Total warnings: 195010 warnings
cat("\nColumns in warnings data:\n")
## 
## Columns in warnings data:
print(names(warnings))
## [1] "repo_name"       "month"           "event_time"      "relative_period"
## [5] "issue_key"       "component"       "line"            "rule"           
## [9] "creation_date"

Data Preparation

# Join warnings with definitions to get severity, type, and category
warnings_enriched <- warnings %>%
  left_join(definitions, by = "rule") %>%
  mutate(
    # Create period label
    period = ifelse(relative_period < 0, "Pre-Cursor", "Post-Cursor"),
    period = factor(period, levels = c("Pre-Cursor", "Post-Cursor")),

    # Ensure severity is ordered
    severity = factor(severity,
                     levels = c("INFO", "MINOR", "MAJOR", "CRITICAL", "BLOCKER")),

    # Ensure type is factor
    type = factor(type, levels = c("CODE_SMELL", "BUG", "VULNERABILITY")),

    # Fill in missing categories as "Unmapped"
    category = ifelse(is.na(category) | category == "", "Unmapped", category),
    category = factor(category)
  )

# Summary statistics
cat("\nData summary:\n")
## 
## Data summary:
cat("Pre-Cursor warnings:", sum(warnings_enriched$period == "Pre-Cursor"), "\n")
## Pre-Cursor warnings: 18617
cat("Post-Cursor warnings:", sum(warnings_enriched$period == "Post-Cursor"), "\n")
## Post-Cursor warnings: 176393
cat("Total repos:", n_distinct(warnings_enriched$repo_name), "\n")
## Total repos: 607

Overall Statistics

# Calculate summary statistics by period
overall_summary <- warnings_enriched %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarise(
    total_warnings = n(),
    unique_repos = n_distinct(repo_name),
    unique_rules = n_distinct(rule),
    warnings_per_repo = n() / n_distinct(repo_name)
  )

kable(overall_summary,
      caption = "Overall Warning Statistics by Period",
      digits = 2) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
Overall Warning Statistics by Period
period total_warnings unique_repos unique_rules warnings_per_repo
Pre-Cursor 18617 244 548 76.30
Post-Cursor 176393 575 895 306.77

Severity Distribution

Severity Counts

severity_summary <- warnings_enriched %>%
  filter(!is.na(severity)) %>%
  group_by(period, severity) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(count),
    percentage = (count / total) * 100
  )

# Wide format for comparison
severity_wide <- severity_summary %>%
  select(severity, period, count, percentage) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = period,
    values_from = c(count, percentage),
    names_glue = "{period}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    count_change = `Post-Cursor_count` - `Pre-Cursor_count`,
    pct_change = `Post-Cursor_percentage` - `Pre-Cursor_percentage`
  )

kable(severity_wide,
      caption = "Severity Distribution Comparison",
      digits = 2) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
Severity Distribution Comparison
severity Pre-Cursor_count Post-Cursor_count Pre-Cursor_percentage Post-Cursor_percentage count_change pct_change
INFO 855 8589 4.59 4.87 7734 0.28
MINOR 7292 62006 39.17 35.15 54714 -4.02
MAJOR 8074 71850 43.37 40.73 63776 -2.64
CRITICAL 2326 33075 12.49 18.75 30749 6.26
BLOCKER 70 873 0.38 0.49 803 0.12

Severity Visualization

# Bar plot of severity distribution
p1 <- ggplot(severity_summary, aes(x = severity, y = percentage, fill = period)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-Cursor" = "#E69F00", "Post-Cursor" = "#56B4E9")) +
  labs(
    title = "Severity Distribution: Pre vs Post Cursor",
    x = "Severity Level",
    y = "Percentage of Warnings",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# Stacked percentage
p2 <- severity_summary %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  mutate(cum_pct = cumsum(percentage)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = period, y = percentage, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "YlOrRd", direction = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Severity Distribution (Stacked)",
    x = "Period",
    y = "Percentage",
    fill = "Severity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)

Warning Type Distribution

Type Counts

type_summary <- warnings_enriched %>%
  filter(!is.na(type)) %>%
  group_by(period, type) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(count),
    percentage = (count / total) * 100
  )

# Wide format
type_wide <- type_summary %>%
  select(type, period, count, percentage) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = period,
    values_from = c(count, percentage),
    names_glue = "{period}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    count_change = `Post-Cursor_count` - `Pre-Cursor_count`,
    pct_change = `Post-Cursor_percentage` - `Pre-Cursor_percentage`
  )

kable(type_wide,
      caption = "Warning Type Distribution Comparison",
      digits = 2) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
Warning Type Distribution Comparison
type Pre-Cursor_count Post-Cursor_count Pre-Cursor_percentage Post-Cursor_percentage count_change pct_change
CODE_SMELL 17236 166745 92.58 94.53 149509 1.95
BUG 1363 9298 7.32 5.27 7935 -2.05
VULNERABILITY 18 350 0.10 0.20 332 0.10

Type Visualization

ggplot(type_summary, aes(x = type, y = percentage, fill = period)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%\n(n=%s)", percentage,
                                scales::comma(count))),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-Cursor" = "#E69F00", "Post-Cursor" = "#56B4E9")) +
  labs(
    title = "Warning Type Distribution: Pre vs Post Cursor",
    subtitle = "BUG = Actual bugs, CODE_SMELL = Maintainability issues, VULNERABILITY = Security issues",
    x = "Warning Type",
    y = "Percentage of Warnings",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray40")
  )

Category Distribution

Top 20 Categories

category_summary <- warnings_enriched %>%
  filter(!is.na(category)) %>%
  group_by(period, category) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(count),
    percentage = (count / total) * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Get top 20 categories overall
top_categories <- category_summary %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  summarise(total_count = sum(count)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_count)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  pull(category)

# Filter to top categories
category_top <- category_summary %>%
  filter(category %in% top_categories)

# Wide format
category_wide <- category_top %>%
  select(category, period, count, percentage) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = period,
    values_from = c(count, percentage),
    names_glue = "{period}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    count_change = `Post-Cursor_count` - `Pre-Cursor_count`,
    pct_change = `Post-Cursor_percentage` - `Pre-Cursor_percentage`
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(`Pre-Cursor_count` + `Post-Cursor_count`))

kable(category_wide,
      caption = "Top 20 Category Distribution Comparison",
      digits = 2) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                font_size = 11) %>%
  scroll_box(height = "500px")
Top 20 Category Distribution Comparison
category Pre-Cursor_count Post-Cursor_count Pre-Cursor_percentage Post-Cursor_percentage count_change pct_change
Code Style 3776 36773 20.28 20.85 32997 0.56
Code Complexity 2318 32356 12.45 18.34 30038 5.89
Code Hygiene 2416 30186 12.98 17.11 27770 4.14
Type Safety 2181 17023 11.72 9.65 14842 -2.06
Naming Conventions 1206 15193 6.48 8.61 13987 2.14
React Patterns 2254 13118 12.11 7.44 10864 -4.67
API Usage 972 7801 5.22 4.42 6829 -0.80

Error Handling 611 1859 3.28 1.05 1248 -2.23

Security 27 485 0.15 0.27 458 0.13
HTML Structure 13 35 0.07 0.02 22 -0.05
Resource Management 3 13 0.02 0.01 10 -0.01

Average Warnings per Repo per Month by Category

# Calculate average warnings per repo per month for each category
category_repo_month <- warnings_enriched %>%
  filter(!is.na(category)) %>%
  group_by(period, category, repo_name, month) %>%
  summarise(warnings_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # Calculate average across months for each repo-category-period
  group_by(period, category, repo_name) %>%
  summarise(avg_warnings_per_month = mean(warnings_count), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # Calculate average across repos for each category-period
  group_by(period, category) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_warnings = mean(avg_warnings_per_month),
    median_warnings = median(avg_warnings_per_month),
    sd_warnings = sd(avg_warnings_per_month),
    n_repos = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Filter to top categories and create wide format
category_avg_wide <- category_repo_month %>%
  filter(category %in% top_categories) %>%
  select(category, period, mean_warnings, median_warnings) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = period,
    values_from = c(mean_warnings, median_warnings),
    names_glue = "{period}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_change = `Post-Cursor_mean_warnings` - `Pre-Cursor_mean_warnings`,
    mean_pct_change = ifelse(`Pre-Cursor_mean_warnings` > 0,
                             (`Post-Cursor_mean_warnings` - `Pre-Cursor_mean_warnings`) / 
                               `Pre-Cursor_mean_warnings` * 100,
                             NA)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(`Pre-Cursor_mean_warnings` + `Post-Cursor_mean_warnings`)) %>%
  select(category,
         `Pre-Cursor_mean_warnings`, `Post-Cursor_mean_warnings`,
         `Pre-Cursor_median_warnings`, `Post-Cursor_median_warnings`,
         mean_change, mean_pct_change)

kable(category_avg_wide,
      caption = "Average Warnings per Repository per Month by Category",
      digits = 2,
      col.names = c("Category",
                    "Pre Mean", "Post Mean",
                    "Pre Median", "Post Median",
                    "Mean Change", "Mean % Change")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                font_size = 11)

Category Visualization

# Reorder categories by total count
category_top <- category_top %>%
  mutate(category = fct_reorder(category, count, .fun = sum))

ggplot(category_top, aes(x = percentage, y = category, fill = period)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 2.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-Cursor" = "#E69F00", "Post-Cursor" = "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 20 Warning Categories: Pre vs Post Cursor",
    x = "Percentage of Warnings",
    y = "Category",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9)
  )

Category Change Analysis

# Calculate percentage point change for all categories
category_change <- category_summary %>%
  select(category, period, percentage) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = period, values_from = percentage, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    change = `Post-Cursor` - `Pre-Cursor`,
    abs_change = abs(change)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_change)) %>%
  head(15)

ggplot(category_change, aes(x = change, y = fct_reorder(category, change))) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = change > 0), alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.2f%%", change)),
            hjust = ifelse(category_change$change > 0, -0.1, 1.1),
            size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#D55E00", "FALSE" = "#009E73"),
    labels = c("Decreased", "Increased"),
    name = "Direction"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 15 Category Changes (Percentage Point Difference)",
    subtitle = "Post-Cursor % minus Pre-Cursor %",
    x = "Percentage Point Change",
    y = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
